input.text: The goverment has announced a new iniative to support small buisnesses in rural areas. The programme, which will be role out over the next twelve months, aims to provide financial assisstance and mentoring to entrepreneurs who's businesses are based outside of major urban centres. Applicants will need to demostrate that there business has been operating for atleast two years. The minister said that the programme would compliment existing support schemes.
input.house_style: Oxford comma: yes. Spell out numbers under ten.

input.text: Their going to announce the results on wendsday. The committee has all ready made it's decision.

The Europian Commission's proposal for a regulation on artifical intelligence, which was first tabled in April 2021, has undergone substancial revisions during the legislative proccess. The final text, wich was adopted by the European Parliment in March 2024, establishes a risk-based aproach to AI goverance. High-risk AI systems, including those used in law enforcment and employment desicions, are subject to strict requirments including mandatory conformaty assessments and transparancy obligations.
